case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. DEVON MARMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARMAN, DEVON DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-09-2018
